description: Legal or official document, probably some sort of a receipt, in Arabic script. Baqā b. Bū l-Fakhr owes some sums to Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān. Contains an ʿalāma, alpha-numerals and glyphs. The note on verso reads: "qubiḍa mā-fī bāṭinihā ʿaynan", probably indicating to its payment. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בJRL.
